news_items.headline: Surging Devers, Adames helping Giants' offense get its 'mojo' back
Struggling Shohei Ohtani won’t hit on one of Wednesday or Thursday
news_items.summary: LOS ANGELES — Shohei Ohtani won’t hit in one of the final two games against the San Francisco Giants this week, but Dodgers manager Dave Roberts hasn’t yet decided if that will be on Wednesday when Ohtani pitches or on Thursday for what would amount to a mental reset day for the slumping superstar. When […]

news_items.headline: Arizona Diamondbacks 1, Texas Rangers 0: Love to Slurve You, Baby
news_items.summary: Record: 20-20. Pace: 81-81. Change on 2025: -1.
